V-M-024.checks: Admin endpoints can list devices, view anomaly and recent anti-abuse context, and block or unblock or revoke a specific device peer while preserving user-level auth boundaries.
V-M-024.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_admin_device_control.py -v

scenarios.scenario: Admin blocks specific device peer without affecting other devices
Admin device payload exposes recent anti-abuse event context for operator triage
Enforcement bypasses auth or disables whole user account instead of targeted device
